title: Czech Republic: Metaldyne acquires additional facility | Automotive World
fetched: raw-HTML 直抓 + 抽取(html:paragraphs) + 清洗（逐字、未经任何模型/改写/翻译）
original_text:
“Our goal is to help stakeholders understand the future of mobility.”

Metaldyne has announced the acquisition of a facility in Zbysov, Czech Republic, which is near Brno, Czech Republic and close to the borders of Austria and Slovakia. The company will initially focus on expanding certain technologies within the Zbysov plant which will support growth within its forging and machining product lines. Metaldyne Subscribe to Automotive World … Continued

Metaldyne has announced the acquisition of a facility in Zbysov, Czech Republic, which is near Brno, Czech Republic and close to the borders of Austria and Slovakia.

The company will initially focus on expanding certain technologies within the Zbysov plant which will support growth within its forging and machining product lines.
